productDisplayName: ADIDAS Kids Duramo Synthetic White Sports Shoes
description: If running is what your little one likes, then there's no better way to hone the skills of those young legs than with this pair of Duramo running shoes. Light in weight and well cushioned, kids are sure to find their energy doubling with each stride.UpperSynthetic leather upper with perforations for enhanced durability and breathabilityTextile inner with a meshed and cushioned inner collar for absolute breathable comfortMeshed and padded tongue and collar for all-day comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitErgonomically curved and padded footbed for all-day comfortadidas Patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleMidsolePhylon midsole for an absolutely cushioned ride, lightweight comfort and enhanced impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with adiWEAR in the heel for enhanced durability, and has flex grooves for ease of movement Impact guidance system for better spread of shock and enhanced energy returnScooped heel for enhanced cushioning to the backfoot and anklesShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
